title: De Neven met Mods
description: Modpack for people with no attention span.
body:
This modpack is a way to experience the vanilla game in an enhanced way, without compromising too much of the original gameplay. Some of the key features include:

✔️ Better Crafting and Inventory Management

✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation (Terralith, BetterNether, BetterEnd)

✔️ Optimized for Lower End Computers and Shader Support

✔️ New and Rebalanced Mobs (Creeper Overhaul, Friends and Foes)

✔️ Tonnes of New Dungeons & Structures (Additional Structures, YUNG's )

✔️ QoL Features like Rebalanced Enchantments, New Mob Variants, Better Third Person and More.

✔️ Antique Atlas and a Better F3 Menu

✔️ Almost 100 Mods
